---
title: "The Rev. Duke Yonge"
---

## The Rev. Duke Yonge

**Dates:** (3 Dec 1750-3 Dec 1823)

### Description

Vicar of Cornwood, paternal grandfather of CMY.

### Biography

He served as Vicar of Cornwood 1793-1811.  He married (12 Mar 1777) Catherine, sister of Sir Thomas Crawley-Boevey.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 24th 1882
- Letter from March 28th 1864

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
